raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "The Governor's updated budget includes deep cuts to healthcare.",
    "Denial of coverage, increased premiums, and asset tests will harm the financial security of in-need families.",
    "Cuts to healthcare will lead to increased paperwork and emergency room visits.",
    "Eliminating dental care can lead to worsened dental health outcomes for college students.",
    "The rising costs of prescription drugs are a burden on California families.",
    "Runaway Pharmacy Benefit Managers (PBMs) are driving up drug prices.",
    "Policies aimed at regulating PBM practices can promote affordability in drug pricing.",
    "Increasing transparency and accountability in drug pricing is necessary for cost reduction."
